file_insights.purpose: Comprehensive tests for Pydantic data models
coverage: EvalResult model (verdict, score, rationale, improvements, strengths, weaknesses)
Preset model (name, language, description, style, genre, mood, tempo, lyric_themes, structural_tags)
GenerationRecord model (iteration, output, evaluation, parent_iteration, timestamp)

patterns_discovered: Pydantic ValidationError testing for invalid data
Model serialization roundtrips using model_dump() and model_validate()
Default value testing for optional fields
Use of pytest fixtures for sample data across test classes
gotchas_discovered: type: ignore[call-arg] required when intentionally calling models without required arguments
ValidationError raised for out-of-bounds numeric values (score < 0 or > 1)
Preset names use hyphens internally but support underscore lookup
Default values in Preset: tempo='moderate', structural_tags=['[Verse]', '[Chorus]', '[Bridge]', '[Outro]']
GenerationRecord fields evaluation and parent_iteration are optional (None defaults)
discoveries.approach_outcome: SUCCESS - Complete test suite implemented with 5 model test classes and 2 preset test classes covering validation, boundaries, defaults, serialization, and name mapping
recommendations: Add tests for empty/whitespace-only values in string fields
Add tests for unicode and special characters in text fields
Consider adding property-based tests (hypothesis) for boundary value fuzzing
Document the hyphen-to-underscore preset name normalization in code comments
Add tests for concurrent access patterns if presets are used in multi-threaded contexts
Consider adding integration tests for full generation workflow combining all models
